risk: Frontier-lab SDKs (OpenAI Agents, Claude Agent) eat the category
mitigation: Be the agnostic Switzerland. Run on every provider. Own observability + evals + voice as differentiators.
MCP-first but adapter-flexible; can speak OpenAI tool format too.
Schedule slip is acceptable; ship voice at M7 instead of MVP. Edge POPs + warm pool.
CTO writes first-draft TurnExecutor; new hire inherits. Multiple parallel candidates.

risk: Botpress closes the gap (voice + MCP + true OSS in 12mo)
mitigation: Architecture mid-pivot makes this unlikely. We move faster on each axis.
Hire bar #1 must be exceptional. Sprint 0 establishes a working baseline.

risk: Compliance burden (SOC2, HIPAA) blocks enterprise revenue
mitigation: Vanta day 1. Hire sec eng by M5. SOC2 Type 1 by M12.

risk: OSS license arbitrage (hyperscaler offers managed Loop)
mitigation: Apache 2.0 accepts the risk; brand + control plane + network effects are the moat.

risk: Eval harness over-promises; teams don't adopt
mitigation: `loop eval init` scaffolds from production replay automatically. Public registry seeds value.

risk: Cost overruns on infra (LLM, ClickHouse, voice POPs)
mitigation: Budget caps + monthly review. Negotiate annual commits with providers post-Series A.

risk: Channel provider terms change (Meta WhatsApp policies)
mitigation: Multi-BSP support; document fallback path; surface channel cost on invoice.

risk: Studio scope creep (users want a flow editor)
mitigation: Politely decline. Code-first is the wedge. Optional read-only DAG view at M9.
